preference_profile.purpose: preferenceProfile for scoring and ordering unreviewed Iceland AI roles
preferenceNotes: Strong positive signals: explicit AI/data-science/data-engineering/NLP/LLM/product-AI emphasis, especially where the work is central rather than incidental.
Maybe signals: AI-focused QA or full-stack can be worth a look, but generic QA/full-stack is not enough by itself.

Negative signals: roles far from AI emphasis, auditing/accounting/procurement/finance ops/production/maintenance, generic front-end/full-stack/C# programming, and old/archive postings that are probably filled.
Workplace/company caveats from feedback: Crowberry Capital is a negative due to prior personal experience; university roles are low-interest unless unusually compelling.
Enjoyed task signals: working with data, data-driven decisions, practical applied AI, language/NLP, and model/LLM work.

feedback.reason: Not a fan of this particular company because of prior personal experience
